title: PwD - Accessing Stories Section - Functional Test Plan (33 Test Cases)
overview: Functional testing of SCRUM-109: PwD - Accessing Stories Section. Validates stories listing page navigation, story card elements, pagination, like/share interactions, story details page content, before/after badges, device featured box, back navigation, and responsive behavior.

testCases.title: Stories link is visible in top navigation
steps: Verify Stories link in top nav.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the homepage.
expectedResults: Stories link is visible in top navigation.

testCases.title: Clicking Stories nav link opens stories page
testCases.preconditions: User is on the homepage.
expectedResults: Clicking Stories link opens the stories page.

testCases.title: Page displays Success Stories heading
testCases.preconditions: User is on the stories page.
expectedResults: 'Success Stories' heading is displayed.

testCases.title: Page displays subtitle Real experiences from the community.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the stories page.
expectedResults: Subtitle 'Real experiences from the community.' is displayed.

testCases.title: Story card has cover image
testCases.preconditions: User is on the stories page.
expectedResults: First story card has a cover image.

testCases.title: Story card has category tag
testCases.preconditions: User is on the stories page.
expectedResults: Category tag is visible on story card.

testCases.title: Story card has story title
testCases.preconditions: User is on the stories page.
expectedResults: Story title text is visible on card.

testCases.title: Story card has author name and avatar
steps: Verify author name and avatar initial.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the stories page.
expectedResults: Author name and avatar initial are visible.

testCases.title: Story card has published date
testCases.preconditions: User is on the stories page.
expectedResults: Published date is visible on card.

testCases.title: Story card has summary text
testCases.preconditions: User is on the stories page.
expectedResults: Summary text is present on card.

testCases.title: Story card has Read Story CTA
testCases.preconditions: User is on the stories page.
expectedResults: 'Read Story' button is visible on card.

testCases.title: At least 6 stories load by default
testCases.preconditions: User is on the stories page.
expectedResults: At least 6 story cards are loaded.

testCases.title: Pagination or load-more is available if more stories exist
testCases.preconditions: User is on the stories page.
expectedResults: Pagination or load-more is available.

testCases.title: Like icon is visible on story card
steps: Verify like icon on first card.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the stories page.
expectedResults: Like icon is visible on first card.

testCases.title: Share icon is visible on story card
steps: Verify share icon on first card.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the stories page.
expectedResults: Share icon is visible on first card.

testCases.title: Clicking Like icon toggles state
testCases.preconditions: User is on the stories page.
expectedResults: Like icon state toggles on click.

testCases.title: Clicking Read Story opens story details page
steps: Click Read Story on first card.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the stories page.
expectedResults: Clicking Read Story opens story details page.

testCases.title: Story details page URL changes from listing
steps: Verify URL is different from listing.
testCases.preconditions: User clicked Read Story.
expectedResults: URL changes from listing page.

testCases.title: Details page shows cover image
steps: Verify cover image on details page.
testCases.preconditions: User is on a story details page.
expectedResults: Cover image is visible.

testCases.title: Details page shows story title
testCases.preconditions: User is on a story details page.
expectedResults: Story title heading is visible.

testCases.title: Details page shows author name and date
testCases.preconditions: User is on a story details page.
expectedResults: Author name and date are visible.

testCases.title: Details page has Like and Share buttons
steps: Verify like and share on details.
testCases.preconditions: User is on a story details page.
expectedResults: Like and Share buttons are visible.

testCases.title: Details page has My Journey section
testCases.preconditions: User is on a story details page.
expectedResults: 'My Journey' heading is visible.

testCases.title: Details page has Before/After comparison badges
testCases.preconditions: User is on a story details page.
expectedResults: Before and After comparison badges are visible.

testCases.title: Details page has The Impact section
testCases.preconditions: User is on a story details page.
expectedResults: 'The Impact' heading is visible.

testCases.title: Device Featured box shows device name and image
steps: Verify device box with name and image.
testCases.preconditions: User is on a story details page.
expectedResults: Device Featured box shows device name and image.

testCases.title: Back to Stories link is present
testCases.preconditions: User is on a story details page.
expectedResults: 'Back to Stories' link is present.

testCases.title: Read More Success Stories CTA is present
testCases.preconditions: User is on a story details page.
expectedResults: 'Read More Success Stories' CTA is present.

testCases.title: View Device Details navigates to product page
testCases.preconditions: User is on a story details page.
expectedResults: Clicking View Device Details navigates to product page.

testCases.title: View All Stories / Back to Stories navigates to stories listing
testCases.preconditions: User is on a story details page.
expectedResults: Clicking Back to Stories navigates to stories listing.

testCases.title: Stories page renders on mobile viewport
testCases.preconditions: Browser viewport set to mobile (375x667).
expectedResults: Stories page content is visible on mobile.

testCases.title: Stories page renders on tablet viewport
testCases.preconditions: Browser viewport set to tablet (768x1024).
expectedResults: Stories page content is visible on tablet.

testCases.title: No horizontal overflow on mobile
testCases.preconditions: Browser viewport set to mobile.
expectedResults: No horizontal overflow on mobile.
